message:
feat: add mod/pow/floordiv operators, row-wise apply, and extensive conformance fixes

- fp-expr: add Modulo, FloorDiv, Pow AST nodes with correct precedence
  (** > unary > */÷//%); parse //, %, **, leading-dot floats, and
  bitwise shorthand &|~; fix -2**2 to evaluate as -(2**2) = -4
- fp-columnar: implement vectorized f64 execution for Mod, Pow, FloorDiv;
  fix scalar from_values to preserve NaN/NaT null markers
- fp-frame: add Series::apply/map_func for element-wise custom functions;
  add DataFrame::apply_rows for row-wise (axis=1) custom functions;
  add DataFrame::diff_axis1 and pct_change_axis1 for column-direction
  differencing; expand DataFrame::mode to return all modes with NaN
  padding; fix Series::is_sorted_ascending to use semantic_ge comparator;
  expand GroupBy::rank to support min/max/first/dense/average methods
  with keep/top/bottom NA handling; fix GroupByResample for multi-column
  groupby keys; add StringAccessor::count(pat) for regex match counting
- fp-groupby: fix Min/Max aggregation to always return Float64 (was
  incorrectly returning Int64 for integer inputs)
- fp-index: add is_monotonic_increasing/decreasing; fix multi_way_align
  to preserve insertion order instead of sorting (matching pandas
  align_union(sort=False) semantics)
- fp-io: replace ensure_unique_headers with mangle_duplicate_headers
  (col.1, col.2 renaming matching pandas); expand NA detection to full
  pandas default list; add Parquet Date32/Date64/Timestamp reading
- fp-types: add Scalar::semantic_cmp/semantic_le/semantic_ge for
  cross-type comparison; fix common_dtype Utf8 resolution
- fp-join: preserve right column dtype in merge_asof output
- fp-conformance: register new ops (IndexIsMonotonic*, DataFrameDiff,
  DataFramePctChange, DataFrameMergeAsof); add --print-mismatches flag;
  fix fp_p2c_002 fixture data; wire merge_asof to Python oracle
- Cargo.lock: add chrono dependency for fp-io

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1787,6 +1787,29 @@ def op_dataframe_merge_index(pd, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
     return op_dataframe_merge(pd, payload, use_index_keys=True)
 
 
+def op_dataframe_merge_asof(pd, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    frame_payload = payload.get("frame")
+    frame_right_payload = payload.get("frame_right")
+    if frame_payload is None or frame_right_payload is None:
+        raise OracleError("dataframe_merge_asof requires frame and frame_right payloads")
+
+    left = dataframe_from_json(pd, frame_payload)
+    right = dataframe_from_json(pd, frame_right_payload)
+
+    on = payload.get("merge_on")
+    if on is None:
+        on = payload.get("on")
+    if on is None:
+        raise OracleError("dataframe_merge_asof requires 'merge_on' column string payload")
+
+    direction = payload.get("direction", "backward")
+
+    try:
+        out = pd.merge_asof(left, right, on=on, direction=direction)
+    except Exception as exc:
+        raise OracleError(f"dataframe_merge_asof failed: {exc}") from exc
+    return {"expected_frame": dataframe_to_json(out)}
+
 def op_dataframe_concat(pd, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
     frame_payload = payload.get("frame")
     frame_right_payload = payload.get("frame_right")
@@ -1981,6 +2004,8 @@ def dispatch(pd, payload: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
         return op_dataframe_merge(pd, payload)
     if op in {"dataframe_merge_index", "data_frame_merge_index"}:
         return op_dataframe_merge_index(pd, payload)
+    if op in {"dataframe_merge_asof", "data_frame_merge_asof"}:
+        return op_dataframe_merge_asof(pd, payload)
     if op in {"dataframe_concat", "data_frame_concat"}:
         return op_dataframe_concat(pd, payload)
     raise OracleError(f"unsupported operation: {op!r}")
